title: ecosystem: add SwarmX — multi-agent AI orchestration with x402 payments
description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform with 47 x402-gated endpoints on Solana mainnet. 10 categories including crypto analysis, DeFi, trading, research. Premium endpoints from $0.001–$5.00 USDC. 39 MCP tools, dual LLM (Gemini 2.5 Flash + GPT-4o).
scrape_title: SwarmX — AI Agent Teams. One Payment.
scrape_desc: Try AI agent teams for contract audits, token risk analysis, and research — free, no wallet needed.
notes: Railway-hosted deployment. npm: @itachisol/plugin-x402-swarms. GitHub: ItachiDevv/eliza-x402-swarms. Implements Kye Gomez's x402 monetization pattern.

title: Add Naro to ecosystem — flight data API for AI agents
description: Real-time flight search and booking API for AI agents. Wraps 300+ airlines behind x402 micropayments at $0.02/search in USDC on Base. No API keys, no sign-up, no enterprise contracts.
scrape_title: Naro — Real-Time Flight Data for AI Agents
scrape_desc: Flight search and booking infrastructure for AI agents. Real-time data from 300+ airlines via simple micropayments.
notes: Submitter bio: 'js copy paster' — low signal GitHub profile. Clean domain naro.com.ai. $0.02/search via POST /api/flights/search.

title: Add APIMesh to ecosystem — 23 x402-payable API tools
description: 23 web analysis APIs for AI agents: Core Web Vitals, Security Headers, SEO Audit, Tech Stack Detection, Email Verification, Email Security, Brand Assets, Redirect Chain, Indexability, and more. Pay per call USDC on Base. MCP server available.
scrape_title: APIMesh — Web Analysis APIs for AI Agents

notes: Closed (not merged) — superseded by #1855 (v1 unsigned commit) then re-submitted as #1864 with GPG-signed commit. MCP: @mbeato/apimesh-mcp-server. Smithery: apimesh-mcp-server. llms.txt confirmed 200.

title: Add HedgeAlphaOracle and EventAlphaOracle to ecosystem
description: Two oracle services: HedgeAlphaOracle (crypto/stock trading signals: sentiment, alpha, Fear & Greed, whale alerts, portfolio risk) and EventAlphaOracle (prediction market signals from 40+ sportsbooks + Polymarket/Kalshi). Multi-chain: Base, Monad, Hedera, Algorand.
notes: Two entries in one PR. Submitter bio: 'Nurse turned Web3 builder & educator'. Provider site: nurse2web3.com. Railway-hosted. Notable: multi-chain support beyond Base.

title: feat(ecosystem): add Rosud facilitator to ecosystem directory

title: feat(ecosystem): add Semagram to ecosystem partners
description: Machine-to-machine global semantic search for Telegram communities. Discover Telegram channels, groups, and bots with metadata. REST API with GET /api/agent/search at $0.01 USDC per search. No API keys.
notes: Agent API docs at semagram.io/agent-api.md. GitHub rate-limited during enrichment — submitter repo count not available.
